Axel Dörner.title: The Beauty of Exaggeration
Axel Dörner.artist: Petr Vrba, Ivan Palacký, Axel Dörner
Axel Dörner.about:
Axel Dörner: trumpet, electronics
Ivan Palacký: Dopleta 180 amplified knitting machine
Petr Vrba: trumpet, electronics
Peter Graham: organ on Rattle Gatherers
Track 1 and 3 recorded in gallery mimokolektiv by Václav Hruška on 20.11.2017, Olomouc, Czech Republic
Track 2 recorded at Husův sbor by Ladislav Mirvis Mirvald on 19.11.2017, Brno, Czech Republic
thanks to AVA collective, Sandra Silná, Ladislav Mirvis Mirvald, Jakub Frank, mimokolektiv,  Martin Klimeš, Jaroslav Bašta, Punctum, Divadlo 29, Zdeněk Závodný, Václav Hruška
Axel Dörner.credits:
released April 10, 2020
Petr Vrba, Ivan Palacký, Axel Dörner
